hero.title: Sokołek Studio
hero.subtitle: Calm. Order. Craft.
hero.description: We are a compact studio from Poznań. We create intelligent websites, AI automations, and brand presence for companies that value quality. No corporate jargon, no mass templates. Just technology that makes life easier.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.heading: A digital home for a place built with real care.
portfolio.description: DOG TOK is a training retreat for dogs and their handlers: 3.5 hectares of fenced space, workshops, camps, cabins, water, and infrastructure designed for focus.

dogTok.title: DOG TOK
dogTok.subtitle: DOG TOK Szkoleniowy Raj
dogTok.summary: A minimal bilingual site for a place in Magiczny Las. Workshops, camps, lodging, dog-friendly facilities, and a 2026 schedule are organized into a clear editorial structure.

manifesto.label: Philosophy

sectionOne.heading: Good work defends itself before it has to shout.
sectionOne.description: We believe in digital craft. Just as lasting objects are made from honest, high-quality materials, we build systems from scratch with clean code. Every button and every function has to make work easier. If something is not useful, we remove it.

sectionTwo.heading_part2: We will put it in order.
sectionTwo.description: Tell us what you are building, what needs to work better, and where design or AI can remove friction. We will respond with a concrete next step.

principles: Start with what must become obvious.
Design the smallest system that can carry the ambition.
Remove everything that does not help the user.

contact.description: Tell us what you want to build, organize, or accelerate. We will answer plainly: what makes sense, where to start, and how to make it lighter.

footer.description: Sokołek Studio is our shared Poznań project. We combine years of engineering experience with aesthetic judgment to help companies work smarter and look sharper.

cookieConsent.label: Cookie consent
cookieConsent.heading: Can we use analytics cookies?
cookieConsent.description: We use Google Analytics only to understand how people use this site. It starts only after you accept.
